cohort_source: NCBI Pathogen Detection PDG000000032.673 (measured AST + NCBI AMRFinderPlus calls)
independence: provenance-disjoint from the AR-Bank isolates (different isolates/BioSamples); NOT methodology-independent (same AMRFinderPlus + same neisseria_amr cell).
clonality_caveat: RAW sens/spec is clonality-inflated (gonococci clonally structured); lineage-collapse (Mash on assemblies) is the follow-up.

ciprofloxacin.rule: gyrA QRDR (Ser91/Asp95) point mutation -> R (parC accessory-only)
ciprofloxacin.headline: SCORED_ENDORSED

cefixime.rule: penA mosaic-34 core {I312M,V316T,N512Y,G545S} >=3 -> cefixime R (v0.1: narrowed from 'any penA ESC point'; partial-mosaic A510V/F504L reduced-suscept -> S; non-mosaic high-MIC path not caught -> sens ceiling)
cefixime.headline: SCORED_ENDORSED

ceftriaxone.rule: penA Ala501 (A501P/T/V high-level mosaic-60 marker) -> ceftriaxone R (v0.1: narrowed from 'any penA point'; reduced-suscept A510-mosaics -> S; sens untested on this all-S-scored cohort)
ceftriaxone.headline: UNDERPOWERED

azithromycin.rule: 23S rRNA A2045G/C2597T (macrolide target) -> R (mtrR efflux accessory-only: low-level, over-calls)
azithromycin.headline: DEGENERATE_NOT_ENDORSED

penicillin.rule: blaTEM (plasmid penicillinase, PPNG) OR ponA_L421P (chromosomal PBP1) -> R (v0.2: narrowed from the v0.1 'penA/mtrR promoted' rule that over-called to spec 0.0 on the NCBI-PD cohort -- penA-point/mtrR are near-universal; blaTEM(0 FP)+ponA_L421P(1 FP) give sens 0.93/spec 0.94)
penicillin.headline: SCORED_ENDORSED

tetracycline.rule: tet(M) (plasmid, HIGH-level TRNG) -> R (v0.2: narrowed from the v0.1 chromosomal-promoted rule, which over-called to spec 0.0 on the NCBI-PD cohort -- the v0.1 docstring's predicted failure once tet-S isolates existed; chromosomal low-level tet-R (rpsJ_V57M + mtrR + penB cumulative) is NOT cleanly determinant-separable -> disclosed sens ceiling ~0.32)
tetracycline.headline: SCORED_NOT_ENDORSED
